acceptance_criteria.text: board_members table created; board creator auto-inserted as owner; GET/POST/DELETE /api/boards/:boardId/members endpoints work with proper authorization (invite=owner, remove=owner, list=member)

comments table created; POST/PATCH/DELETE comments endpoints work with auth checks (create=member, edit=author, delete=author or owner); comment creates 'commented' activity entry and auto-watches card for commenter
reactions table created; POST /api/boards/:boardId/reactions toggles reactions (add/remove); enforces 8-emoji allow-list; unique constraint per user/emoji/target; returns action and reaction object
card_watchers table created; POST /api/boards/:boardId/cards/:cardId/watch toggles watching; card detail response includes is_watching boolean and watcher_count number
activity table gains user_id column; all new activity entries record acting user's ID; existing entries without user_id show 'System' as actor
All existing board-scoped endpoints check board_members for authorization instead of just board.user_id === userId; non-members get 403
GET /api/boards/:boardId/cards/:cardId returns unified timeline (comments + activity sorted newest first with reactions), is_watching, watcher_count, board_members list for @mention autocomplete
GET /api/boards/:boardId/activity?limit=30&before=<timestamp> returns paginated board-wide activity+comments feed newest first with has_more boolean; default limit 30, max 100

Board header shows member avatars (colored initial circles, max 5 + '+N' overflow, owner badge); invite button opens popover with username input, Enter/click to invite, success/error inline, close on outside click/Escape

Card modal unified timeline replaces old Activity section; comments show avatar+username+content (rendered @mentions as bold)+timestamp+edit/delete+reactions; system activity compact with icon+description+timestamp+reactions

Comment input at bottom/top of timeline; expands on focus to textarea+Save button; @mention autocomplete dropdown on '@' keystroke filtered by typed text; submit on Ctrl+Enter or Save; disabled when empty/whitespace

Reaction picker: smiley icon on hover of timeline items; click opens horizontal 8-emoji bar; clicking emoji toggles reaction; reaction chips below items show emoji+count; highlighted if current user reacted; clickable to toggle
Watch button (eye icon) in card modal header; filled/highlighted when watching, outline when not; tooltip 'Watch'/'Watching'; watcher count shown; auto-watch on commenting

Board activity sidebar: toggle button in board header (clock icon); slides from right as overlay; unified feed newest first; card title links open modal; Load more pagination; close button and click-outside to dismiss

current_focus: AC12: Reaction picker + AC14: Board activity sidebar
